summary: Vertical video. Eight seconds of phone footage of ICE officers (plate carriers reading 'POLICE - Enforcement and Removal Operations', Black Rifle Coffee Company caps) handcuffing and walking a detained man to a vehicle outside a Sheetz gas station. There is no song, narration, graphics, or added editing.
notable_text: Officer vest text: 'POLICE - ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS'; 'Black Rifle Coffee Company' caps; on-location signage: 'SHEETZ'. No on-screen titles or slogans.
